_readme: This is a REFERENCE document — do not import it. The Connect flow import format is proprietary and changes between releases. Build the flow manually in the Connect flow designer using the block settings below.

_blocks_to_add_in_order.purpose: Optional — set language and voice (e.g. Australian English, Olivia)
Hands the call to the Bedrock Agent for the full conversation

settings.Agent ID: REPLACE_WITH_AGENT_ID      (from Bedrock → Agents → your agent overview page)
settings.Agent alias ID: REPLACE_WITH_AGENT_ALIAS_ID (from Bedrock → Agents → your agent → Aliases tab)

_blocks_to_add_in_order.purpose: Ends the call after the agent finishes

_flow_structure: Entry → (Set voice) → Amazon Bedrock agent → Disconnect
